Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. DOS Memory Management 19 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. The Cathode Ray Tube site 36 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. First in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe: study 291 upvotes, 51 comments
  4. The 185-Microsecond Type Hint 65 upvotes, 8 comments
  5. RCade: Building a Community Arcade Cabinet 75 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. Simple screw counter 84 upvotes, 17 comments
  7. Inside the M4 Apple Neural Engine, Part 1: Reverse Engineering 318 upvotes, 90 comments
  8. Physicists developing a quantum computer that’s entirely open source 89 upvotes, 20 comments
  9. Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch 341 upvotes, 101 comments
  10. Seed of Might Color Correction Process (2023) [pdf] 84 upvotes, 20 comments
  11. Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS 2162 upvotes, 784 comments
  12. Guido van Rossum Interviews Thomas Wouters (Python Core Dev) 13 upvotes, 1 comments
  13. Launch HN: OctaPulse (YC W26) – Robotics and computer vision for fish farming 97 upvotes, 33 comments
  14. Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts 186 upvotes, 74 comments
  15. British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time 718 upvotes, 358 comments
  16. Buckle Up for Bumpier Skies 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  17. Daily Driving GrapheneOS 55 upvotes, 21 comments
  18. Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns 958 upvotes, 546 comments
  19. Ars Technica fires reporter after AI controversy involving fabricated quotes 201 upvotes, 123 comments
  20. Programmable Cryptography (2024) 65 upvotes, 35 comments
  21. Against Query Based Compilers 57 upvotes, 33 comments
  22. I built an RGB controller with Arduino 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. The Excommunicated Devs Making Games with AI 41 upvotes, 25 comments
  24. Elevated Errors in Claude.ai 85 upvotes, 63 comments
  25. Intent-Based Commits 32 upvotes, 19 comments
  26. Moldova broke our data pipeline 34 upvotes, 23 comments
  27. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (March 2026) 201 upvotes, 237 comments
  28. Guilty Displeasures 54 upvotes, 61 comments
  29. iPhone 17e 253 upvotes, 357 comments
  30. New iPad Air, powered by M4 370 upvotes, 595 comments

Last generated 3:30pm, 3 March 2026. Source here.
